title: Unique 72871 Colourful Santa Christmas Activity Placemats, Pack of 8
availability_text: Only 5 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Pack of 8 Colourful Santa Christmas Activity Placemats
Great for a kids Christmas party
Each sheet includes a colouring section, a word search and a crossword puzzle
Combine with other Colourful Santa Christmas party supplies from Unique Party
description: Have fun while waiting for your festive fare using our colourful Santa Christmas activity placemats! These colouring placemats feature colour-in illustrations, a word search, and a crossword puzzle. Use these 8 placemats to designate each place setting on your table. Then, set out markers and crayons to keep kids (and adults) entertained at your Christmas dinner!
